recommendations.title: CHiPs
recommendations.overview: The adventures of two California Highway Patrol motorcycle officers as they make their rounds on the freeways of Los Angeles.

recommendations.title: Hit & Run
recommendations.overview: When former getaway driver Charlie Bronson jeopardises his Witness Protection Plan identity in order to help his girlfriend get to Los Angeles, the feds and Charlie's former gang chase them on the road.

recommendations.title: Modern Times
recommendations.overview: A bumbling tramp desires to build a home with a young woman, yet is thwarted time and time again by his lack of experience and habit of being in the wrong place at the wrong time..

recommendations.title: All Day and a Night
recommendations.overview: While serving life in prison, a young man looks back at the people, the circumstances and the system that set him on the path toward his crime.

recommendations.title: Get the Gringo
recommendations.overview: A career criminal nabbed by Mexican authorities is placed in a tough prison where he learns to survive with the help of a 9-year-old boy.

recommendations.title: The Blues Brothers
recommendations.overview: Jake Blues, just released from prison, puts his old band back together to save the Catholic home where he and his brother Elwood were raised.

recommendations.title: The Mirror Crack'd
recommendations.overview: Jane Marple solves the mystery when a local woman is poisoned and a visiting movie star seems to have been the intended victim.

recommendations.title: Johnny Handsome
recommendations.overview: A career criminal who has been deformed since birth is given a new face by a kindly doctor and paroled from prison. It appears that he has gone straight, but he is really planning his revenge on the man who killed his mentor and sent him to prison.

recommendations.title: Tramps
recommendations.overview: A young man and woman find love in an unlikely place while carrying out a shady deal.

recommendations.title: Face/Off
recommendations.overview: In order to foil a terrorist plot, an FBI agent undergoes facial transplant surgery and assumes the identity of a criminal mastermind. The plan turns sour when the criminal wakes up prematurely and seeks revenge.
